stemHtml: Which option is correct as regards to Air Traffic Advisory Services or Air Traffic Control Services? Air Traffic…

options.a: Advisory Services deliver “clearances” and “advisory information” and do NOT use the word “suggest”....
options.b: Control Services do NOT deliver “clearances” but only “hearing information” and use the phrases “Can I” or “Do you allow me”....
options.c: Control Services deliver “advisories” and “suggestions” and do NOT use the word “cleared"....
options.d: Advisory Services do NOT deliver “clearances” but only “advisory information” and can use the word “suggest”....
